short_reason: Strong, well-structured article with excellent keyword integration and comprehensive coverage. The anatomy section, wildcard+credentials banking scenario, and detailed audit checklist are all high-quality. Minor weaknesses: the GraphQL section is comparatively thin and the introduction could open with a more compelling hook. Overall, this is a publish-ready piece.
red_flags: The introduction opens with a textbook-style definition; a real breach stat or exploit example would create a stronger opening hook
The GraphQL CORS section is the shortest and most conceptual — it could be strengthened with a specific exploit scenario
The article does not reference current browser enforcement changes (Chrome/Firefox tightening) mentioned in the research summary
No bolded keywords in the body for SEO enhancement
